name: automatizacion-sgr-e2e
description: Framework base de automatizacion E2E con Playwright, TypeScript, Cucumber, Gherkin y Page Object Model.

scripts.test:contactos: cucumber-js tests/features/contactos/**/*.feature --tags "@contactos and not @no_automatizar and not @cron and not @rpc and not @api_externa and not @bug_bloqueante"
scripts.test:productos: cucumber-js tests/features/productos/**/*.feature --tags "@productos and not @no_automatizar and not @cron and not @rpc and not @api_externa and not @bug_bloqueante"
